provenance.excerpt: Hotfix 9.5.3 (2013-08-14) buffed this mod from a maximum of +30% Armor Piercing damage (+5% per rank) to a maximum of +90% (15% per rank).
As of Update 11.0 (2013-11-20) this mod gets a 10% increase in damage per rank, and has been changed from Armor Piercing to Puncture damage.
Can be combined with Bore and Jugulus Spines to provide a 300% increase to Puncture damage.
